content: MV3 service worker gotchas: terminated after ~30s idle; any single event handler >5min killed; global variables lost on termination — persist to chrome.storage; setInterval/setTimeout unreliable — use chrome.alarms (min ~30s/1min granularity); WebSocket/long-lived connections die on sleep; event listeners must be registered synchronously at top level or wake-up events are missed; async listener registration silently drops events. Test by explicitly terminating worker mid-operation. Inactivity-based diagnostics timers must use chrome.alarms + storage, not in-memory timers. Content scripts and side panel persist independently of the worker.
